typeDescriptions.typeString: function (contract ERC20,string memory,string memory,address,address,contract Authority) returns (contract FeeVault)

documentation.text: @notice Vault depositor deposits tokens
@notice Attacker attempts to withdraw (should always fail)
@notice Attacker attempts to grant themselves roles (should always fail)
@notice Attacker attempts to set capabilities (should always fail)
@notice Attacker attempts to pause vault (should always fail)
@notice Attacker attempts whitelist modification (should always fail)
@notice Vault depositor attempts withdrawal (P0 - should always fail)
@notice Vault depositor attempts redeem (P0 - should always fail)
@notice Executor attempts whitelist modification (role separation - should fail)
@notice Guardian can pause (should succeed)
@notice WhitelistAdmin can set whitelists (should succeed)
@notice Owner retains admin role
@notice Attacker never gains any role
@notice Main invariant: no privilege escalation possible
@notice P0 invariant: depositor cannot withdraw
@notice P0 invariant: depositor cannot redeem
@notice Role separation: executor cannot manage whitelists
@notice Owner always has admin
@notice Guardian can pause
@notice Mock ERC20 for testing

@title Authority
 @notice Interface for authorization logic
@notice Tracks which roles each user has
@notice Tracks which capabilities are public (callable by anyone)
@notice Tracks which roles can call which functions on which targets
@dev Storage slot for reentrancy guard (keccak256("reentrancy.guard.slot") - 1)

@title ReentrancyGuard
 @notice Abstract contract providing reentrancy protection
@notice Safe subtraction that returns 0 on underflow
@notice Multiply then divide with full precision intermediate
@notice Calculate percentage: (value * bps) / 10000
@notice Square root using Babylonian method

@title MathLib
 @notice Gas-optimized math utilities
@notice Initialize vault with dead share assets (call after deployment)

@notice Super-admin role for contract upgrades, emergency actions, and provider management
 @dev Assigned to Gnosis Safe multisig (3-of-5 recommended)

@notice Execution role for trade execution and analytics recording
 @dev Assigned to AI agent for automated operations

@notice Flash loan and arbitrage execution role
 @dev Can execute flash loans and strategy flows, but cannot withdraw from vault

@notice Risk management role for scores and circuit breakers
 @dev Controls risk parameters across RiskEngine and related contracts

@notice Cross-chain bridge execution role
 @dev Can execute bridge trades but cannot configure chain parameters

@notice Strategy registration and management role
 @dev Can add/remove/toggle strategies in StrategyOrchestrator

@notice Parameter update role for cooldowns, limits, and general settings
 @dev Split from original broad UPDATER for granular control (P1 fix)
